title: Circuit Breakers (Hystrix Pattern)
description: Architect circuit breaker patterns (e.g., Hystrix) to prevent cascading failures. Implement fail-fast mechanisms and provide fallback responses for overloaded dependencies. Evaluate the effectiveness of circuit breakers in maintaining system resilience under stress.
objectives: Architect circuit breaker patterns (e.g., Hystrix) to prevent cascading failures.
Implement fail-fast mechanisms and provide fallback responses for overloaded dependencies.
Evaluate the effectiveness of circuit breakers in maintaining system resilience under stress.
